name: Gao

skills.name: Guitar Solo
skills.description: For every 3 Basic Attacks or skills Gao uses, his Basic Attack is enhanced,dealing damage on hit.

skills.name: Wild Chord
skills.description: Launches musical notes that bounce between enemies, dealing damage.

skills.name: String Bender
skills.description: Damages and slows enemies within range. Hits on heroes restore Health, and he gains damage reduction during the dash.

skills.name: Rock Out!
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed and damage reduction while dealing continuous damage to enemies within range.

tips: Gao is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.9% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Insatiable Tome → Boots of Resistance → Savant's Wrath → Void Staff → Staves of Sorcery → Splendor.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Gao's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Wild Chord → String Bender → Rock Out! → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Gao excels into Mai Shiranui, Wukong, Xuance. Avoid blind picking into Li Xin, Kaizer, Dun without team peel.
Gao sits at Tier B globally (50.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Gao good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Gao is Tier B Mage with 50.9% win rate, 0.6% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Gao build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Insatiable Tome, Boots of Resistance, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff, Staves of Sorcery, Splendor. Run Nightmare arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Gao?
faqs.answer: Pick Li Xin, Kaizer, Dun into Gao. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Gao completes core items. Gao struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Gao counter?
faqs.answer: Gao is strong into Mai Shiranui, Wukong, Xuance according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Gao when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Gao good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Gao sits at Tier B globally (50.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Gao play?
faqs.answer: Gao is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Gao?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Gao or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Gao vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 0.1% more often globally. Choose Gao when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Gao?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Mage picks unless targeting a one-trick.
